title: argyranthemum frutescens var. gracilescens
intro: Argyranthemum frutescens var. gracilescens, also known as the Dwarf Silver Daisy or Marguerite, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Argyranthemum frutescens var. gracilescens include reducing inflammation, alleviating fever, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies for its calming and soothing effects.
